message:
feat(cli): add btrfs chunk-group reporting to ffs info --groups (bd-1gb6)

Previously --groups only worked for ext4 images; btrfs fell through to a
limitation stub. Now btrfs is fully supported via sys_chunk_array parsing.

crates/ffs-cli/src/main.rs:
- Replace InfoOutput.groups type from Option<Vec<Ext4GroupInfoOutput>>
  with Option<GroupsInfoOutput> — a new tagged enum dispatching between
  Ext4 { entries } and Btrfs { entries } variants
- New BtrfsGroupInfoOutput struct capturing chunk logical/physical ranges,
  type flags, stripe layout, owner, and sector size
- New BtrfsStripeInfoOutput struct for per-stripe devid, physical range,
  and device UUID
- build_btrfs_group_info: reads btrfs_context(), iterates sys_chunk_array
  chunks, computes inclusive address ranges with saturating arithmetic,
  formats device UUIDs
- print_groups_info: dispatch on enum variant with btrfs-specific format
  showing chunks, logical/physical ranges, stripe details, and type flags
- btrfs_chunk_type_flag_names: decode DATA/SYSTEM/METADATA bits with
  UNKNOWN(0x...) fallback for unrecognized bits
- New test build_test_btrfs_superblock_with_single_chunk: synthetic 2MiB
  btrfs image with one chunk (disk_key + fixed fields + stripe + CRC32c)
- New test build_info_output_btrfs_groups_reports_chunk_layout: full
  integration through build_info_output, validates addresses, flags,
  stripe count, and absence of old limitation string
- New test btrfs_chunk_type_flag_names_reports_known_and_unknown_bits

.beads/issues.jsonl: add bd-1gb6 (in_progress)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
